name: Odd Molly International AB (publ)
summary: Odd Molly International AB (publ) designs, markets, and sells fashion and other lifestyle products for girls and woman under the Odd Molly brand name worldwide. The company offers short and long dresses; sweaters, cashmere, cardigans, canna cardigans, and lovely knits; blouses, T-shirt/tops, and tanks; pants, skirts, jeans, and leggings; jackets and coats, and skiwear; and lingerie and accessories, as well as home d√É¬©cor products. The company sells its products through its own sales channels and retailers. It operates through 16 own stores in Sweden, Norway, and Finland; and 7 partner-run stores in the United States, the Czech Republic, Slovakia, and Portugal, as well as a Web shop. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
